caption: The video shows a person crafting a birthday card on a grid-lined cutting mat. The card features a camouflage pattern with a white oval in the center that reads, "Hoping your BIRTHDAY is filled with ALL THE best things." The person's hands are visible as they carefully apply adhesive tape to the edges of the card, likely to secure it or prepare it for further embellishments. The workspace is organized, with various crafting materials and tools neatly arranged around the cutting mat. The person appears to be focused on their task, ensuring precision in their work.
